validation_tools.name: fetch_fhir_context
validation_tools.description: Reads patient, coverage, encounter, provider, organization, documents, conditions, and procedures when IDs are available.

validation_tools.name: check_eligibility
validation_tools.description: Checks coverage presence, active status, and service date inside coverage period.

validation_tools.name: check_prior_authorization
validation_tools.description: Checks payer prior-authorization rules against approved authorization records.

validation_tools.name: check_coding_consistency
validation_tools.description: Checks diagnosis/procedure presence and MVP documentation support for selected codes.

validation_tools.name: check_documentation
validation_tools.description: Checks encounter, SOAP note, diagnosis, procedure, and payer-required documents.

validation_tools.name: apply_payer_rules
validation_tools.description: Applies deterministic payer rules, KG ICD-procedure checks, and optional LLM checks for rules that require narrative review.

validation_tools.name: check_timely_filing
validation_tools.description: Checks date of service against payer timely-filing windows.

issues.message: Tawuniya requires prior authorization for CPT 99214.
issues.fix: Obtain prior authorization for procedure code 99214 before claim submission.

review.recommended_next_step: Route to RCM review before submission.

issues.message: Tawuniya requires prior authorization for CPT 99214.
issues.fix: Obtain prior authorization for procedure code 99214 before claim submission.

issues.message: No SOAP note excerpt is available for coding consistency review.
issues.fix: Attach or extract the SOAP note before final validation.
Attach or extract the SOAP note before submission.
Add an ICD code matching one of ['I10', 'I11'], or remove CPT 99214.

hold.recommended_next_step: Block submission until critical issues are fixed.

issues.message: FHIR authentication failed while fetching live validation context.
issues.fix: Refresh backend credentials, verify SMART scopes/JWKS, and rerun validation.

issues.message: No coverage was found for the patient.
issues.fix: Verify patient insurance details or request updated coverage information.

fhir_auth_failure.recommended_next_step: Block submission until critical issues are fixed.

warnings.message: FHIR authentication failed while fetching live validation context.
